## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content strategy and execution services to Bubble's growth and content teams.](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint that combines planning and execution, powered by AI workflows and a content OS](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Bubble has existing persona/positioning work that can accelerate the process](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes an audience-first approach, well-cited content, and programmatic content refreshing to optimize for both SEO and AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Bubble is interested in modernizing their strategy for zero-click content and integrating multi-channel approaches (blog, social, YouTube)](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Strategy Sprint and Content OS

  - [8-week initial engagement combining strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Develops artifacts like product overviews, personas, and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows for brief creation, research, drafting, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Adapts workflows based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Includes LLM tracking and query monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

### Bubble's Current Content Situation

  - [Extensive existing work on personas and positioning (60-page guide)](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Working with agency Overthink for 1.5 years](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Focused on competitor comparisons and generic category search](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Producing 4-8 pieces (editorial/landing pages) monthly](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Limited by technical SEO constraints of Bubble platform](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### SEO and AI-Driven Search Strategies

  - [Well-cited, cross-linked content optimized for both SEO and AI](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Emphasis on keeping content fresh across large surface areas](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Programmatic approach to monitoring queries and adapting content](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Focus on audience-first strategy while optimizing for AI discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

### Multi-Channel Content Approach

  - [Bubble oversees blog, social media, YouTube, and product enablement content](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Interest in integrating search/discovery strategy across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [GrowthX can potentially assist with newsletter creation and content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a deeper 1-hour dive session to further discuss Bubble's needs](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Bubble team to shared Slack and send sample SOW](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose potential dates for strategy sprint (typically 4-6 weeks out)](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [Bubble to share any relevant materials to help GrowthX prepare for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/dK1fv6s1fjxaxGmbLQnkM_-2nhzkWZqL?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
